questions.question: How much faster do founders with templated contracts close compared to those who draft from scratch?
questions.explanation: Solo founders with templated contracts close 25-40% faster. Across 20 deals per year, that's roughly 100 hours of contract prep time saved.

questions.question: How many contract templates does a solo founder need?
questions.explanation: You need exactly 5 templates: Mutual NDA, Engagement Letter, MSA, SOW, and SaaS Terms of Service. Not fifteen, not two. Five covers every standard scenario a solo founder encounters.

questions.question: When should you use an Engagement Letter instead of a full MSA + SOW?

options.text: For services engagements under $10K — coaching, short consulting, workshops
When the client doesn't have a legal team

questions.explanation: Engagement Letters (2-3 pages) are for services engagements under $10K — coaching, short consulting projects, workshops, audits. They're simpler than MSA + SOW but still provide protection for scope, payment, and terms.

questions.question: The Mutual NDA template is one where a freely available online template is almost always sufficient.
questions.explanation: True. The Mutual NDA is highly standardized. A downloaded template from LawDepot or Bonsai is almost always sufficient — it's the one template where custom drafting is rarely necessary.

questions.question: Audit your current contract situation. Do you have all 5 templates ready to use? Which are missing? How long does it currently take you to send a contract after verbal agreement, and how would templates improve this?
questions.aiPrompt: Evaluate whether the response inventories their current templates against the 5-template set, identifies specific missing templates, estimates their current contract preparation time, and projects how templates would reduce that time.
